ACADEMICS @
SRI ESHWAR
Industry-relevant course content and skill based learning methods form the crux of our programme offerings. We extensively engage industry professionals to empower our faculty and students and help them stay updated. We also constantly update our curriculum and stay agile to suit the changing needs of industries. Our goal is to ensure that students are industry-ready in all aspects for their
BRIGHT CAREERS
.
Bokep JAV Sub Indo
GOJAV Sub Indo
VegaMovies

ADMISSIONS
WORLDCLASS
FACILITIES
At Sri Eshwar, we go to great lengths to make sure we provide the best infrastructure and facilities for our students. With the right ambience, we can bring out the best potential hidden inside every student.
We give the best facilities and ambience to students and expect the best performance from them, in return!
Collab Space
Collab Space, a space where students work in teams, collaborate to build products, gear up for upcoming hackathons and work on interesting projects. Collab Space provides the right ambience for students to get into the corporate groove.
MakerSpace
MakerSpace is a state-of the art facility specially designed to promote interdepartmental, multidisciplinary collaboration among students. This space provides exceptional facilities, training and mentorship to turn their ideas into successful products.The students are also groomed here to compete in national and international level contests.
Interactive Classrooms
To stay in-line with the skill-based teaching methods, our classrooms are equipped with smart and interactive boards to bring a wide variety of learning possibilities to students. Throughout the lectures, students stay connected to their laptops, to experiment and try out the problems being taught. Our classrooms are truly an engaging and interactive experience for students.
IT Centre
IT Centre was built  to provide students with an ultimate experience of an IT company. The IT Centre houses a 200 seater auditorium, Centres of Excellence with Virtusa, Aspire Systems, NTT Data etc and Extended Development Centres. Students are rigorously trained and prepared for placements here.Through the Centres of Excellence, the recruited students are given company specific training, so that they can be readily deployed into projects when they join the company.
Innovative Learning Spaces
Throughout the campus, you will find that Sri Eshwar is willing to go the extra mile to create the right ambience for learning. Students can learn well, when the environment is casual, supportive and comfortable. Our learning spaces are designed by keeping in mind the student’s comfort while they learn together in teams.
Centre of Excellence
Our Centres of Excellence promote multi-disciplinary learning which brings a confluence of ideas and new innovations to the forefront. Uniquely designed spaces, inspires students to work on their projects with a free and happy mind, and extracts their best capability.
Placement Training Facility
As a top placements college, we pride ourselves in providing exclusive placement training facilities. With more than four 200+ seating capacity facilities, four 60+ seating capacity training rooms, we can accommodate about 1000 students to undergo dedicated hands-on placement training at a time. With such exclusive training facilities paired with industry mentorship and high quality students, Sri Eshwar continues to top in placements every year in Tamil Nadu!.
Synapse Studio
Synapse Studio, an IT auditorium provides students with a hands-on learning experience. Industry experts and senior professionals utilize this space to conduct highly engaging hands-on sessions. dents to get into the corporate groove.
Centre for International Relations
Centre for International Relations immerses itself in enabling the exchange of students between Sri Eshwar and universities around the globe.The walls of this Centre is embellished with the pictures of the students and their university details who have already gone abroad and gathered rich and immersive experiences. This highly inspires students and also gives awareness on the possibilities of global education.
Centre for Higher Education & Foreign Languages
This Centre is used by students who wish to prepare for higher studies. Awareness sessions  on widespread future career options available to students after graduation, are conducted in the first year itself, by experts. Students who aspire for Higher Education, use the Centre to attend Coaching classes for competitive exam preparation. The Centre also conducts foreign language training in German and Japanese.
Ignite - Startup Accelerator
Ignite serves as a dedicated facility to drive innovation and entrepreneurial spirit into the mind of every Eshwarite. Ignite is a facility dedicated for students who wish to convert their ideas to prototypes and proof of concepts. A well equipped conference room, leader cabins, collaborative workspaces, discussion spaces form a part of the Ignite experience. Ignite, staying true to its name, ignites the spark of innovation in the minds of Eshwarites.
Centre for Research
Centre for Research has been established at Sri Eshwar with the intent to promote active research work by the faculty and student community for their academic research to publish papers, file patents and work on research projects.The Centre promotes focussed research through its 9 Advanced Research Centres. This Centre prides itself in housing some of the top research scientists of the world.
State-of-the-art Labs
While labs are an integral part of the learning process, Sri Eshwar goes the extra mile to provide students an innovative lab experience, so that they feel fully equipped and energized to go beyond the books and curriculum and use the labs to experiment their fresh ideas and test their hypothesis.
Vista Hall
Vista Hall, will be actively utilized for Industry Connect programmes, Leadership talk, Expert guest lectures, seminars and a wide variety of events. Vista Hall is equipped with state-of-the-art audio-visual infrastructure to support highly engaging presentations.
Sound Recording Studio
A fully equipped recording studio with studio lights and professional sound recording facilities, helps faculty record course content  as an additional effective way of teaching,  Students too walk in to record their presentations, podcasts and other audio bytes for their needs. Sri Eshwar nightingales from the Harmonix club also enjoy recording their songs with professional sound mixers.
Amenity Centre
Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas.
Medical Centre
A fully functional Medical Centre is equipped to handle any emergency health-related services and comprehensive medical care for students. With a full time doctor and two nurses, latest medical equipment for basic treatment, separate wards for boys and girls, this facility can provide quick medical care for our students.
Sports Facilities
Sports is an integral part of the Sri Eshwar learning experience. We have dedicated facilities, coaches and equipments for a wide variety sports including, basketball, volleyball, athletics, cricket, hockey, kabbadi etc. With a team of enthusiastic coaches, our talented Eshwarites sports team, wins many awards and accolades in various sports tournaments. Winning is a habit of our Eshwar sports champions!

Sri Eshwar is an extensive research institute!

New and ingenious ways of solving a problem, having a fresh alternate perspective, implementing ideas that have never been thought of before – such is the culture of our students and faculty at Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation. We sow the seeds of entrepreneurial spirit within Eshwarites and give them the freedom to think and innovate.
Creativity and Innovation is in the air!

With global cultural and knowledge exchange, new perspectives are born!

the urge to reach one’s full potential is in the DNA of Eshwarites!

CAMPUS
LIFE
LIVELY AND HAPPY CAMPUS!
Buzzing with lively and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is always a fun-filled and happy campus. After a rigorous day of learning, our students have a host of activities to indulge in and engage themselves.Be it their love of music and dance, sweating it out in the sports field, or getting together with peers through club activities, the vibe around the campus is always
HAPPY AND UPBEAT!
EXPERIENCE THE CAMPUS LIFE
CAMPUS TOUR
ADMISSIONS
HOSTEL
CREATING MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!
COZY ROOMS.
COMFORTABLE STAY.
Well designed airy rooms,  clean and fully equipped kitchens, dining space with multi cuisine food options, facilities like laundry, salon & supermarket, lots of greenery, unique seating spaces for friends to get together and have casual conversations, extended lab facilities for students to work after college hours – forms a part of the Sri Eshwar hostel experience.
Extended learning is a big part of hostel life. Our hostel at night, with beautiful lighting and the young energetic vibe of students, is a must-see for all! In a nutshell, Sri Eshwar hostel will provide the  ambience to relax, enjoy a variety of tasty food, and also to collaborate and grow in the company of peers.

KNOW MORE
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
What are the programmes offered at Sri Eshwar?
Sri Eshwar is an autonomous institution affiliated to Anna University. We offer programmes like B.E and B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Mechanical,Information Technology, Computer Science and Business Systems, Computer and Communication, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.
Is there an active Alumni cell at Sri Eshwar?
Yes, Sri Eshwar has an active Alumni cell that conducts activities throughout the year. Our alumni are dedicated in giving back to their alma mater and participate in various college activities as judges and mentors for their juniors.
Does college offer Research sponsorships?
Yes. College offers seed fund for research projects. Many projects are currently active through college seed fund. Apart from this the Centre for Research and Development also procures funds from government organizations to take up sponsored research projects.
Does Sri Eshwar college offer placements?
Yes. Sri Eshwar offers stupendous placement record every year in top companies. Our top packages are around 40 Lakhs per annum. Many students get placed at the beginning of third year itself and go for internships at companies.
How is the hostel facility at Sri Eshwar?
Hostel is like a home away from home. We offer a fully safe, secure and a comfortable hostel experience. With beautiful ambience, airy rooms, attached bathrooms, comfortable beds, individual study space, gym, beauty parlour, super market and a state-of-the-art amenity centre, hostel is a must-experience part of
Sri Eshwar
.
How is the campus life at Sri Eshwar?
Sri
Eshwar
campus is full of positivity. It is a vibrant and happening place for students. Apart from studies students engage in many activities out of their interest, organize events and participate in many competitions in co-curricular and extra curricular. Campus ambience is also beautiful with grass and trees everywhere, along with corporate style offices and spaces for students to work on their projects.
